infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Snapfolio needs camera access so you can capture photos and videos directly into your folders.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Snapfolio needs microphone access to record audio with your videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Snapfolio needs photo library access to save and organize your captured media.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Snapfolio needs permission to save photos and videos you capture.

plugins.photosPermission: Snapfolio needs photo library access to save and organize your captured media.
plugins.cameraPermission: Snapfolio needs camera access so you can capture photos and videos directly into your folders.
plugins.microphonePermission: Snapfolio needs microphone access to record audio with your videos.
